arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man United 'to rival Man City' for £50m-rated Serie A midfielder
arts.sum: Manchester United and Liverpool will reportedly rival Manchester City for the signature of Atalanta BC midfielder Ederson this summer.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Man City target Real Madrid star Camavinga as Pep green lights midfield overhaul
arts.sum: Manchester City are considering a summer bid for Real Madrid's Eduardo Camavinga, viewing the 22-year-old France midfielder as an ideal successor to Ilkay Gundogan and Bernardo Silva, FootballTransfers understands. The young French star has the skills, energy, and versatility to thrive under Guardiola, making him an ideal addition to City's midfield, which could lose one or even both of its veteran performers in the summer.

arts.ttl: Man City 'hugely impressed' by £50m Aston Villa attacker as sensational Jack Grealish transfer swap assessed
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly express an interest in signing Aston Villa attacker Jacob Ramsey, who could cost the Citizens in excess of £50m.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs. Man City: Does Erling Haaland's record spell trouble for the Tricky Trees?
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes a look at Manchester City striker Erling Haaland's record against Nottingham Forest, including overall wins, goals and assists.

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Chelsea eye Barcelona duo as Spurs lead Grealish race
arts.sum: The January transfer window is now little more than a distant memory in European football and as such clubs across the continent are already making plans for the summer window. Teams are working...

Man City transfer news: 'Strong possibility' first-team star joins Saudi Pro League this summer
arts.sum: There is a 'strong possibility' that one of Manchester City's star players will move to the Saudi Pro League this summer, according to a report.
